achievements.description: Your camp has become a settlement through the hard work of you and your people
achievements.name: Settled Down

achievements.description: Your settlement has become a village, complete with thriving economy and sturdy infrastructure
achievements.name: Village Life

achievements.description: Your village has earned a spot on the map thanks to your hard work
achievements.name: Town Status

achievements.description: Not only have you thwarted threats, but have continually improved your town into a city
achievements.name: City Builder

achievements.description: You have amassed an army of 100 units
achievements.name: Centurion

achievements.description: You have amassed an army of 500 units
achievements.name: Cohort

achievements.description: You have amassed an army of 5000 units, go forth and dominate!
achievements.name: Legion

achievements.description: You have won the heart and minds of your enemies, acquiring them through non-lethal means
achievements.name: Benevolent Leader

achievements.description: Your ruthlessness has opened the doors to many cities without struggle out of respect, or fear, of you
achievements.name: Feared Leader

achievements.description: Your military prowess has forced your opponents into obedience, and with no alternatives, join your side
achievements.name: Mighty Leader

achievements.description: Careful economic management has amassed you a fortune over 1 million gold
achievements.name: Gold Hoarder

achievements.description: Manors are for plebs, you moved into a chateau overlooking the city
achievements.name: Luxury

achievements.description: Being too good for the city, you moved out to the country in your very own Estate
achievements.name: Extravagance

achievements.description: Well done, everyone is sick, even the cows
achievements.name: Unhygienic

achievements.description: A year has passed and you have not given up, kudos
achievements.name: Survived Winter
